Fields.Name: Enable during Damage
Fields.Description: If ON, the ragdoll moves during damage.

Fields.Name: Parts Mask
Fields.Description: The parts mask value to use. -1 means mask is disabled.

Fields.Name: Heirarchy Gain
Fields.Description: Lowering it will bring it closer to the original pose, while increasing it will make it squishier.

Fields.Name: Speed Decay
Fields.Description: The rate at which the ragdoll's movement speed is reduced. When it approaches 0, it returns slowly, and when it approaches 1, it returns suddenly.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment parameter for rigid acceleration. Lower values will make the movement softer, higher values will make it harder. Should be set to a lower value than the acceleration gain.

Fields.Name: Speed Gain
Fields.Description: Rigid speed adjustment parameter. Lower values will make the movement softer, higher values will make it harder. It seems to be set to a lower value than the speed gain.

Fields.Name: Position Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment parameter for rigid movement position. Lower values will make the movement softer, higher values will make it harder.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum movement speed for the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Maximum Rotation
Fields.Description: Maximum rotation speed for the rigid body.

Fields.Name: Snap Gain
Fields.Description: Adjustment value to get closer to the original pose. Effect similar to position gain.
